Game.Name: Mask, The (Europe)
Game.plot: Overview:The Mask is an action/platformer developed by Black Pearl Software and published by THQ for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System platform.Story:The Mask takes the player through various places in Edge City where characters from the movie like Mrs. Peenman and Dorian are met. The Game is based on the 1994 movie but takes a few liberties and adds a few more locations and characters.Gameplay:As the Mask you have ability's like:Tornado SpinMalletSuper JumpGuns'Squeeze me Gently' HornSuper SpeedSneakLocationsStanley's ApartmentThe Streets of Edge CityEdge City BankLandfill ParkEdge City Jail HouseSewersThe Coco Bongo Club
